this run was my first time using salv too, it's not too hard to learn! it may take you a few tries to get used to it but he's fairly simple
basically you want to use the dupe orison on his cost 2, and spam it as much as possible. everything you do should be geared entirely towards spamming his cost 2 as much as possible (thais exalt dupe it, posse dupe it, every cast of polar should be grabbing a copy of the dupe orison for it, etc)
salv benefits from healing bonus when converting his hp to furnace with his cost 2, and he infinitely ramps in the battle depending on the total amount of furnace accumulated
so basically you just want to spam the cost 2 as much as possible, converting to furnace until it's max, then you either convert it to shield if you need to tank a hit, burn it for damage if you need damage, or just heal with it

the higher your hp the more damage you do, and the bloodpools right before boss can boost your max hp to 4k+ which means you can tank all the boss hits and scale your damage infinitely
